recommendations.title: Duplex
recommendations.overview: When a young couple buys their dream home, they have no idea what the sweet little old lady upstairs is going to put them through!

recommendations.title: Hoffa
recommendations.overview: A portrait of union leader James R. Hoffa, as seen through the eyes of his friend, Bobby Ciaro. The film follows Hoffa through his countless battles with the RTA and President Roosevelt.

recommendations.title: Matilda

recommendations.title: Death to Smoochy
recommendations.overview: Tells the story of Rainbow Randolph, the corrupt, costumed star of a popular children's TV show, who is fired over a bribery scandal and replaced by squeaky-clean Smoochy, a puffy fuchsia rhinoceros. As Smoochy catapults to fame - scoring hit ratings

recommendations.title: Call Me by Your Name

recommendations.title: Savage Grace
recommendations.overview: This examination of a famous scandal from the 1970s explores the relationship between Barbara Baekeland and her only son, Antony. Barbara, a lonely social climber unhappily married to the wealthy but remote plastics heir Brooks Baekeland, dotes on An

recommendations.title: Throw Momma from the Train

recommendations.title: Il bell'Antonio
recommendations.overview: Problems arise for Antonio Magnano when he is unable to consummate his marriage to the beautiful Barbara Puglisi and his virility is called into question. Despite the fact that he loves his beautiful wife and they have otherwise been happily married

recommendations.title: Migration
recommendations.overview: After a migrating duck family alights on their pond with thrilling tales of far-flung places, the Mallard family embarks on a family road trip, from New England, to New York City, to tropical Jamaica.

recommendations.title: Love at First Sight
recommendations.overview: Hadley and Oliver begin falling in love on a flight from New York to London, but when they lose each other at customs, can they defy all odds to reunite?
